requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容发射——IMANOR/NM标准（与ETSI对接）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容發射——IMANOR/NM標準（與ETSI對接）

summary.en: Morocco applies IMANOR Norme Marocaine (NM) standards for electromagnetic emissions of radio and information technology equipment. NM standards are largely aligned with ETSI and CENELEC/IEC equivalents (e.g., NM equivalents of EN 55032 for IT equipment radiated and conducted emissions). Compliance with applicable NM EMC emissions standards must be demonstrated as part of the ANRT homologation process or as a standalone import requirement for non-radio equipment.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥对无线电及信息技术设备的电磁发射适用IMANOR摩洛哥国家标准（NM标准），NM标准与ETSI及CENELEC/IEC等效标准高度对接（如NM等效于EN 55032，涵盖IT设备辐射及传导发射）。对适用NM电磁兼容发射标准的符合性，须作为ANRT型式核准程序的组成部分或非无线设备的独立进口要求加以证明。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥對無線電及資訊技術設備的電磁發射適用IMANOR摩洛哥國家標準（NM標準），NM標準與ETSI及CENELEC/IEC等效標準高度對接（如NM等效於EN 55032，涵蓋IT設備輻射及傳導發射）。對適用NM電磁相容發射標準的符合性，須作為ANRT型式核准程序的組成部分或非無線設備的獨立進口要求加以證明。

standards_or_laws: IMANOR NM standards (equivalent to ETSI EN 55032 — emissions of multimedia equipment)
ETSI EN 55032 (Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements) — referenced as technical basis
ANRT homologation technical requirements referencing ETSI/IEC standards
Loi 24-96 relative à la poste et aux télécommunications (Morocco)

summary.en: China requires GB 9254 (equivalent to CISPR 32 / EN 55032) for electromagnetic emissions of information technology equipment and radio communications equipment. EMC compliance is demonstrated via CCC or voluntary self-declaration depending on product category. GB 9254 covers both radiated and conducted emissions from mains power ports.
summary.zh: 中国对信息技术设备和无线通信设备的电磁发射要求执行GB 9254（等效于CISPR 32 / EN 55032）。电磁兼容符合性根据产品类别通过CCC或自愿性自我声明加以证明。GB 9254同时涵盖辐射发射及主电源端口的传导发射。
summary.zht: 中國對資訊技術設備和無線通訊設備的電磁發射要求執行GB 9254（等效於CISPR 32 / EN 55032）。電磁相容符合性根據產品類別透過CCC或自願性自我聲明加以證明。GB 9254同時涵蓋輻射發射及主電源端口的傳導發射。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of information technology equipment — equivalent to CISPR 32 / EN 55032)
GB 17625.1 (Harmonic current emissions — equivalent to IEC 61000-3-2)
CCC or voluntary self-declaration depending on product category

gap.en: Although Moroccan NM standards align closely with ETSI/CENELEC equivalents of GB 9254, test reports must be issued by laboratories recognised under the Moroccan system (IMANOR accreditation or equivalents accepted by ANRT). Existing China-issued GB 9254 test reports or CE mark DoC test reports may not be directly accepted; submission via the ANRT homologation channel with NM-referenced or ETSI-referenced reports from an accredited laboratory is required.
gap.zh: 尽管摩洛哥NM标准与GB 9254对应的ETSI/CENELEC等效标准高度一致，但测试报告须由摩洛哥体系认可的实验室（IMANOR认可或ANRT接受的等效机构）出具。在中国发出的GB 9254测试报告或CE标志符合性声明测试报告可能不被直接接受；须通过ANRT型式核准渠道提交来自认可实验室的NM参考或ETSI参考测试报告。
gap.zht: 儘管摩洛哥NM標準與GB 9254對應的ETSI/CENELEC等效標準高度一致，但測試報告須由摩洛哥體系認可的實驗室（IMANOR認可或ANRT接受的等效機構）出具。在中國發出的GB 9254測試報告或CE標誌符合性聲明測試報告可能不被直接接受；須透過ANRT型式核准渠道提交來自認可實驗室的NM參考或ETSI參考測試報告。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB 9254 test reports may serve as a technical reference but must be supplemented by reports from IMANOR-recognised or ANRT-accepted laboratories citing the applicable NM or ETSI standard. Standalone CCC documentation does not satisfy Moroccan EMC requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB 9254测试报告可作为技术参考，但须辅以来自IMANOR认可或ANRT接受实验室、引用适用NM或ETSI标准的测试报告。单独的CCC文件不满足摩洛哥电磁兼容要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB 9254測試報告可作為技術參考，但須輔以來自IMANOR認可或ANRT接受實驗室、引用適用NM或ETSI標準的測試報告。單獨的CCC文件不滿足摩洛哥電磁相容要求。

requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容抗扰度——IMANOR/NM标准（与IEC 61000对接）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容抗擾度——IMANOR/NM標準（與IEC 61000對接）

summary.en: Morocco applies IMANOR Norme Marocaine (NM) immunity standards aligned with ETSI EN 55035 and the IEC 61000-4 series for radio and IT equipment. Immunity requirements cover electrostatic discharge (ESD), radiated RF fields, electrical fast transient/burst, surge, and conducted disturbances. Compliance with applicable immunity NM standards must be demonstrated as part of the ANRT homologation or import conformity process.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥对无线电及IT设备的抗扰度适用与ETSI EN 55035及IEC 61000-4系列对接的IMANOR摩洛哥国家标准（NM标准），涵盖静电放电（ESD）、辐射射频场、电快速瞬变/脉冲群、浪涌及传导骚扰等抗扰度要求。须在ANRT型式核准或进口符合性流程中证明符合适用的抗扰度NM标准。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥對無線電及IT設備的抗擾度適用與ETSI EN 55035及IEC 61000-4系列對接的IMANOR摩洛哥國家標準（NM標準），涵蓋靜電放電（ESD）、輻射射頻場、電快速瞬變/脈衝群、浪湧及傳導騷擾等抗擾度要求。須在ANRT型式核准或進口符合性流程中證明符合適用的抗擾度NM標準。

standards_or_laws: IMANOR NM standards (equivalent to ETSI EN 55035 — immunity of multimedia equipment)
IEC 61000-4-2 (ESD), IEC 61000-4-3 (Radiated RF), IEC 61000-4-4 (EFT/Burst), IEC 61000-4-5 (Surge), IEC 61000-4-6 (Conducted RF) — referenced as technical basis
ANRT homologation technical requirements referencing ETSI/IEC standards

summary.en: China applies GB/T 17618 (equivalent to CISPR 35 / EN 55035) for immunity of multimedia equipment, and the GB/T 17626 series (equivalent to IEC 61000-4-x) for individual immunity phenomena. Immunity testing is part of CCC and voluntary certification processes. GB/T standards align closely with IEC equivalents.
summary.zh: 中国对多媒体设备抗扰度适用GB/T 17618（等效于CISPR 35 / EN 55035），对单项抗扰度现象适用GB/T 17626系列（等效于IEC 61000-4-x）。抗扰度测试是CCC及自愿性认证流程的组成部分。GB/T标准与IEC等效标准高度一致。
summary.zht: 中國對多媒體設備抗擾度適用GB/T 17618（等效於CISPR 35 / EN 55035），對單項抗擾度現象適用GB/T 17626系列（等效於IEC 61000-4-x）。抗擾度測試是CCC及自願性認證流程的組成部分。GB/T標準與IEC等效標準高度一致。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17618 (Immunity of multimedia equipment — equivalent to CISPR 35 / EN 55035)
GB/T 17626 series (equivalent to IEC 61000-4-x immunity test series)
CCC or voluntary certification depending on product category

gap.en: The technical content of GB/T immunity standards is closely aligned with IEC/ETSI equivalents used in Morocco. However, test reports must be from laboratories recognised under the Moroccan conformity framework. Existing China-issued GB/T immunity test reports may be used as a technical reference but will typically need to be re-issued or countersigned by an IMANOR-accredited or ANRT-accepted laboratory.
gap.zh: GB/T抗扰度标准的技术内容与摩洛哥采用的IEC/ETSI等效标准高度一致。但测试报告须来自摩洛哥符合性框架认可的实验室。现有中国发出的GB/T抗扰度测试报告可作为技术参考，但通常需由IMANOR认可或ANRT接受的实验室重新出具或联署。
gap.zht: GB/T抗擾度標準的技術內容與摩洛哥採用的IEC/ETSI等效標準高度一致。但測試報告須來自摩洛哥符合性框架認可的實驗室。現有中國發出的GB/T抗擾度測試報告可作為技術參考，但通常需由IMANOR認可或ANRT接受的實驗室重新出具或聯署。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 17618 and GB/T 17626-series immunity test reports align technically with Moroccan NM/IEC requirements, but must be supplemented or re-issued by an IMANOR-recognised or ANRT-accepted laboratory. Standalone CCC immunity documentation does not satisfy Moroccan conformity requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 17618及GB/T 17626系列抗扰度测试报告在技术上与摩洛哥NM/IEC要求高度一致，但须由IMANOR认可或ANRT接受的实验室补充或重新出具。单独的CCC抗扰度文件不满足摩洛哥符合性要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 17618及GB/T 17626系列抗擾度測試報告在技術上與摩洛哥NM/IEC要求高度一致，但須由IMANOR認可或ANRT接受的實驗室補充或重新出具。單獨的CCC抗擾度文件不滿足摩洛哥符合性要求。
